privacyPolicy.title: Explainability
privacyPolicy.desc: Some third-party processors (e.g., AI services) may process data outside the EU. We ensure protection through:
privacyPolicy.desc9: Edit your profile information anytime through your account settings.
privacyPolicy.desc10: Export your data in machine-readable JSON format for transfer to other services.
privacyPolicy.desc11: Opt-out of marketing, profiling, and AI processing at any time through Settings.
privacyPolicy.desc12: Disable stealth mode, revoke Club Sync permissions, or withdraw sharing consent anytime.
privacyPolicy.desc14: Required for authentication, session management, and core platform functionality. Cannot be disabled.
privacyPolicy.desc15: Store your preferences (theme, language, saved filters). You can clear these via browser settings.

termsOfService.title: Language
termsOfService.desc: Candidate, Partner, Strategist, and Admin accounts have different rights, obligations, and features.
termsOfService.desc3: You retain ownership of your CV, profile data, messages, and uploaded content.
termsOfService.desc4: Detailed fee terms are outlined in separate commercial agreements signed between TQC and each partner.
termsOfService.desc5: For sensitive or confidential searches, partners must sign an NDA before accessing candidate dossiers.
termsOfService.desc6: Earn rewards for referring qualified candidates who successfully get hired through The Quantum Club.
termsOfService.desc7: THE PLATFORM IS PROVIDED ')AS IS' WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND.
termsOfService.desc9: We strive for accuracy and reliability but do not guarantee outcomes.
termsOfService.desc10: Before formal proceedings, parties agree to attempt resolution through good-faith discussions.
termsOfService.desc11: Recommended before litigation. We are willing to engage in mediation via a neutral third party.
termsOfService.desc12: Parties may agree to binding arbitration via the Dutch Arbitration Institute (Nederlands Arbitrage Instituut).
termsOfService.desc13: If resolution fails, disputes proceed to the competent courts in Amsterdam, Netherlands.
termsOfService.desc14: We will make reasonable efforts to restore services as quickly as possible.
termsOfService.desc15: If any provision is found invalid or unenforceable, the remainder of these Terms remains in full effect.
termsOfService.desc16: Our failure to enforce any right or provision does not constitute a waiver of that right.
termsOfService.desc17: These Terms are provided in English. If translated, the English version prevails in case of conflict.
